RUN /bin/sh -c cd /etc &&     grep root /usr/share/defaults/etc/passwd > /etc/passwd &&     grep root /usr/share/defaults/etc/group > /etc/group &&     echo 'root:!:::::::' > /etc/shadow # buildkit
ARG BUILD_DATE PROJECT_URL TARBALL VCS_REF VERSION
ARG BUILD_DATE PROJECT_URL RELEASE_DESCRIPTION TARBALL VCS_REF VERSION

LABEL org.opencontainers.image.description=Official containerd image of Arch Linux, a simple, lightweight Linux distribution aimed for flexibility.
